DAG dependency ordering valid. All deliverables committed to feature/verification-hardening (2 commits). Schema validation passes on all output JSONs. Clean working tree.

known_issues: R1_retrospective.md flagged by prompt style linter for missing A-series sections — expected for R-series prompts which use a different template structure
workpack.meta.json declares protocol_version 2.0.0 but workpack uses 2.2.0 features (linter correctly detects it as 2.2.0 via heuristic)

All output JSONs reference commit 2cc2a50 as primary deliverable SHA; A1/A3 output JSON files themselves were created in remediation commit fd85531
Execution metrics (tokens_in/out, duration_ms) are zeroed in all output JSONs — telemetry was not captured

notes: V1 gate re-run (iteration 2). Previous run FAILed due to 3 blockers: (1) A1/A3 pending with no output JSONs, (2) DAG dependency violation, (3) uncommitted deliverables. All 3 blockers resolved via remediation commits 2cc2a50 and fd85531. All 16 acceptance criteria now have full implementation evidence: tools created, 184 tests passing, output JSONs exist for all complete prompts, DAG ordering valid, git status clean.
